question_text: Let G be a simple, unweighted, and undirected graph. A subset of the vertices and edges of G are shown below. It is given that a −b −c −d is a shortest path between a and d; e −f −g −h is a shortest path between e and h; a −f −c −h is a shortest path between a and h. Which of the following is/are NOT the edges of G?
